name: io.github.Agaveis/hiberden-mcp
title: Hiberden
description: Read and verify your local media archive's 3-2-1 coverage across tape, disk, NAS, and cloud.

environmentVariables.name: HIBERDEN_DB
environmentVariables.description: Path to the Hiberden catalog.db. Leave unset to use the default location (%LOCALAPPDATA%\Hiberden\catalog.db), which is correct for a normal Hiberden install. Set this only if your catalog lives somewhere else.
